title: Run TUI Ultrawork command contract tests
prompt: Run the real Kimi Code TUI Ultrawork command contract tests and verify that the prompt contract keeps the internal benchmark loop and web-free boundary active.

args: const fs=require('node:fs'); const contract=fs.readFileSync('apps/kimi-code/src/tui/commands/ultrawork-contract.ts','utf8'); for (const text of ['Kimi Agent Bench','node scripts/kimi-agent-sota-gate.mjs','--phase sota-gate','C001','C002','C003','pass rate','Do not use apps/kimi-web or browser UI paths as a success surface','Human Writing / Anti-Slop','surface-specific voice lane','product UX microcopy uses friendly 해요체','institutional corporate copy uses formal 합니다/습니다','style-analysis inputs only','do not copy source passages','avoid-ai-writing style checks','never use detector signals to accuse an author','reread the result for changed meaning']) { if (!contract.includes(text)) throw new Error(`missing ${text}`); }
